reasoning: The Lean signature defines `g n = Real.sqrt (n+1) - Real.sqrt n`, which matches $a_i = \sqrt{i+1} - \sqrt{i}$. The summation `∑ i ∈ range n, g i` corresponds exactly to $\sum_{i < n} a_i$. The claim `Tendsto (fun n => ...) atTop atTop` is the standard Mathlib encoding of $\lim_{n \to \infty} (\ldots) = \infty$ for a real-valued sequence. All types (`ℕ` index, `ℝ` values) and quantifier structure match the informal statement.
